sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92610" key="r(odo/pnoos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥοδό-πνοος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n92610.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">breathing of roses</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0450.tlg001:26" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ephipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">26</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
